advisors.bio: Michael advises dual-degree EMBA candidates across North America, with a focus on applicants from the technology and financial services sectors.
Amy works with experienced managers and directors in North America, particularly those transitioning from healthcare into tech-enabled leadership roles.
Based in London, Daniel supports EMBA and dual-degree EMBA candidates across Europe, with deep experience in investment banking and strategy consulting.
Claire focuses on European applicants with engineering and manufacturing backgrounds who are pursuing global leadership careers.
Ravi leads admissions advising in Asia, with particular expertise working with candidates from high-growth tech and startup ecosystems.
Linda works with applicants across South America, guiding senior professionals seeking global EMBA and dual-degree options.
Samuel supports EMBA candidates throughout Africa, with experience advising professionals in consulting, energy, and public sector roles.
Fatima is the primary contact for candidates in the Middle East, with deep knowledge of leadership careers in finance and digital transformation.
James advises candidates in Australia and New Zealand who are pursuing global EMBA and online EMBA pathways.
Natalie focuses on North American healthcare executives exploring part-time and dual-degree EMBA formats.

alumni.bio: Elena leads product strategy for a global SaaS company and mentors current dual-degree EMBA students interested in product leadership.
Jonas oversees distributed engineering teams and focuses on scaling tech organizations through agile leadership.
Sofia works at the intersection of fintech and data analytics, leading cross-functional product teams.
David leads an investment banking division focused on cross-border M&A.
Maya advises technology clients on digital transformation and market entry strategies.
Lucas leads regional operations and supply chain optimization initiatives.
Sara focuses on deploying digital health solutions across hospital systems.
Peter leads the digital strategy practice for a boutique consulting firm.
Anna leads data infrastructure teams supporting real-time analytics products.
Thomas manages robotics engineering teams focused on advanced manufacturing.
Noura oversees enterprise risk management for a regional bank.
Omar founded a logistics-tech startup optimizing last-mile delivery.
Isabella leads clinical operations for a multi-site hospital network.
Luis manages operations for a large-scale food manufacturing plant.
Emma leads enterprise solution engineering teams across Europe.

courses.title: Strategic Management for Global Executives
courses.description: Core course covering competitive analysis, corporate strategy, and implementation in global organizations.

courses.title: Financial Accounting & Reporting
courses.description: Core accounting concepts, financial statements, and performance analysis for senior leaders.

courses.title: Leadership, Power & Influence
courses.description: Explores leadership frameworks, influence tactics, and ethical decision-making in executive roles.

courses.title: Operations & Supply Chain Management
courses.description: Design and management of operations and global supply chains with emphasis on efficiency and resilience.

courses.title: Data Analytics for Executive Decision-Making
courses.description: Covers descriptive, predictive, and prescriptive analytics techniques relevant for dual-degree EMBA students.

courses.title: Corporate Finance & Valuation
courses.description: Capital budgeting, valuation, and financing decisions for global corporations.

courses.title: Digital Transformation Strategy
courses.description: Elective focusing on platform business models, ecosystem strategies, and organizational transformation.

courses.title: Technology Markets & Innovation
courses.description: Analyzes disruption, innovation cycles, and technology adoption curves across industries.

courses.title: Saturday Intensive: Innovation Lab
courses.description: Weekend elective where teams prototype and test new business ideas in an intensive lab format.

courses.title: Global Negotiations & Cross-Cultural Management
courses.description: Prepares executives to negotiate and lead across cultures in global organizations.

courses.title: Global Macroeconomics
courses.description: Macroeconomic tools for understanding global markets and policy environments.

courses.title: Leading Across Borders
courses.description: Leadership challenges unique to global, multicultural organizations.

courses.title: Marketing Management
courses.description: Core EMBA course on customer insights, segmentation, and go-to-market strategy.

courses.title: Statistics & Decision Analysis
courses.description: Analytical tools and statistical methods for managerial decision-making.

courses.title: Strategic Thinking in the Digital Age
courses.description: Online EMBA course on strategy frameworks adapted for digital business models.

courses.title: Leading Remote & Hybrid Teams
courses.description: Best practices for leading distributed teams and managing virtual collaboration.

courses.title: Foundations of Data Analytics
courses.description: Core analytics course shared across the MS Data Analytics degree and dual-degree EMBA.

courses.title: Machine Learning for Executives
courses.description: Introduces machine learning concepts for business leaders without requiring coding.

events.title: Dual-Degree EMBA Online Info Session: Program Overview
events.description: Live overview of the dual-degree EMBA options, curriculum, and admissions process, followed by Q&A.

events.title: Dual-Degree EMBA + MS Data Analytics Info Session
events.description: Deep dive into the Global EMBA + MS Data Analytics dual-degree structure, with alumni panel.

events.title: Financing Your Dual-Degree EMBA (Online Session)
events.description: Learn about tuition, funding options, and scholarships for dual-degree EMBA students.

events.title: Dual-Degree EMBA Curriculum Snapshot
events.description: Afternoon info session highlighting first-year curriculum and residencies.

events.title: On-Campus Info Session: Dual-Degree EMBA Experience
events.description: Join us at the Downtown Campus for a tour, class visit, and program overview.

events.title: Webinar: Leading Global Teams in Tech
events.description: Faculty-led webinar on leadership skills for senior tech professionals.

events.title: Class Visit: Data Analytics for Executives
events.description: Sit in on a live dual-degree EMBA analytics class at the Downtown Campus.

events.title: Online Info Session: Executive MBA vs Dual-Degree EMBA
events.description: Compare program formats, timelines, and outcomes with the admissions team.

events.title: Online Info Session: Fall 2026 Dual-Degree EMBA Intake
events.description: Overview of the Fall 2026 intake, including updated curriculum and residencies.

events.title: Alumni Panel: Career Transitions Post-EMBA
events.description: Hear from recent EMBA and dual-degree alumni about their career pivots.

programs.name: Global EMBA + MS Data Analytics
programs.description: A 24-month dual-degree program combining a Global EMBA with an MS in Data Analytics, featuring international residencies and hybrid delivery.

programs.name: Executive MBA + MSc Finance
programs.description: An intensive dual-degree EMBA and MSc in Finance program for finance-focused executives.

programs.name: Bi-Continental EMBA + Master in International Relations
programs.description: A dual-degree EMBA delivered across two continents with a focus on global policy and diplomacy.

programs.name: Executive MBA + Master of Health Administration
programs.description: A dual-degree EMBA and MHA program tailored for senior healthcare leaders.

programs.name: Dual-Degree EMBA
programs.description: Our flagship dual-degree EMBA offering flexible concentrations in finance, technology, and healthcare.

programs.name: Executive MBA (Downtown Campus)
programs.description: A weekend-format EMBA designed for executives based near the Downtown Campus.

programs.name: Executive MBA (Uptown Campus)
programs.description: An EMBA program emphasizing leadership in healthcare and life sciences.

programs.name: Global Executive MBA
programs.description: An 18-month EMBA featuring four global residencies across three continents.

programs.name: Online Executive MBA
programs.description: A fully online EMBA designed for maximum flexibility and global accessibility.

programs.name: MS in Data Analytics (Standalone)
programs.description: A specialized analytics degree that can be paired with the Global EMBA in a dual-degree pathway.

programs.name: Executive Certificate in Technology Leadership
programs.description: A short, online program for senior technology managers preparing for EMBA study.

residencies.title: Singapore Innovation & Tech Residency
residencies.description: An 8-day residency in Singapore exploring innovation ecosystems, digital transformation, and Asian market entry strategies.

residencies.title: Tokyo Digital Business & Innovation Residency
residencies.description: A 9-day immersion in Tokyo focused on digital business models and corporate innovation in Japan.

residencies.title: Shanghai Global Supply Chain Residency
residencies.description: An 8-day residency examining global supply chain design and execution from a Chinese perspective.

residencies.title: London Global Finance Residency
residencies.description: A week in London focused on global capital markets, fintech, and regulatory environments.

residencies.title: Berlin Start-Up & Entrepreneurship Residency
residencies.description: Explore Europe's start-up capital through company visits and venture workshops.

residencies.title: New York Strategic Leadership Residency
residencies.description: A residency at the Downtown Campus with visits to Fortune 500 companies and leadership workshops.

residencies.title: São Paulo Emerging Markets Residency
residencies.description: Examine business opportunities and challenges in Latin America's largest economy.

residencies.title: Dubai Energy & Sustainability Residency
residencies.description: Explore energy transition and sustainable development in the Gulf region.

residencies.title: Cape Town Inclusive Business Residency
residencies.description: Engage with social enterprises and inclusive business models in South Africa.

residencies.title: Sydney Innovation & Design Residency
residencies.description: Learn design thinking and innovation practices in Australia's tech hub.

scholarships.name: Tech Leaders Dual-Degree EMBA Scholarship
scholarships.description: Merit-based scholarship for technology industry professionals enrolling in a dual-degree EMBA program.

scholarships.name: Global Executive Diversity Fellowship
scholarships.description: Supports underrepresented executives in global and dual-degree EMBA programs.

scholarships.name: Women in Leadership Dual-Degree Award
scholarships.description: Awarded to women leaders pursuing a dual-degree EMBA with demonstrated impact in their organizations.

scholarships.name: North America Executive Access Grant
scholarships.description: Needs-based grant for North American executives enrolling in EMBA programs.

scholarships.name: Healthcare Leadership Scholarship
scholarships.description: Supports healthcare professionals pursuing EMBA and dual-degree EMBA programs.

scholarships.name: Online EMBA Access Scholarship
scholarships.description: Designed to improve access to the Online EMBA for candidates from emerging markets.

scholarships.name: Global Residency Travel Grant
scholarships.description: Travel grant to offset costs for required international residencies.

scholarships.name: Emerging Markets Leaders Fellowship
scholarships.description: Fellowship for executives based in emerging markets enrolling in any EMBA format.

scholarships.name: Corporate Partner Sponsorship Match
scholarships.description: Matches a portion of employer sponsorship for participants from approved corporate partners.

scholarships.name: Alumni Legacy Scholarship
scholarships.description: Scholarship for children or spouses of EMBA alumni enrolling in any EMBA format.
